title: AAS DPP4.0 Submodel Binding
description: Binding contract for an individual DPP submodel within the AAS DPP4.0 implementation profile. Validates the submodel metadata needed to mount a regulation-pack submodel onto a DPP shell.

semanticId.description: Semantic ID URI from the IDTA submodel catalog

packId.description: Pack ID that provides this submodel template

idShort.description: Short name used for AAS path navigation

accessClass.description: Minimum access class required to see this submodel in the shell descriptor

version.description: Pack version that generated this submodel
